$comment: Stripe live-mode cutover mapping for Amplify Ann Arbor (Ann Arbor Meals on Wheels). Machine-readable companion to docs/stripe-cutover-inventory.md. Contains NO secret key material of any kind. Generated as step 2 of the sandbox -> live cutover.

activation.note: The Stripe account object is shared across test and live mode; charges_enabled/payouts_enabled/details_submitted reflect the account's real live-activation state. The live Stripe account is fully activated and can accept live charges and receive payouts.

blocker.summary: Live-mode Stripe price/product objects cannot be created this step because no live-mode secret key is present in the deploy environment. Only a test-mode secret key is configured in Cloudflare Pages. The live account itself is fully activated (see activation).
blocker.resolution: Add the live-mode Stripe keys (live publishable + secret, and a live webhook signing secret) to the Cloudflare Pages 'amplifyannarbor' production environment secret store, then create one live Price per tier (or keep dynamic pricing) and populate live_price_id below.
checked: Cloudflare Pages amplifyannarbor env (production + preview): the deployed Stripe secret key is a test-mode key; no live-mode key is present
No stripe CLI installed and no Stripe secret in the builder environment
Vault broker exposes no Stripe credential
No Stripe variables in any Railway project

notes: This site's donate flow (app/api/create-checkout/route.ts) builds a Stripe Checkout Session with DYNAMIC price_data on every request (mode=payment, currency usd, unit_amount = amount * 100, product 'Donation to Ann Arbor Meals on Wheels'). It uses NO stored Stripe Price/Product objects and NO static Payment Links, so there are no sandbox price identifiers to map (sandbox_price_id is null for every tier).

Because pricing is env-driven and dynamic, the actual test -> live cutover for this site is an environment-variable key swap in Cloudflare Pages (documented in docs/stripe-cutover-inventory.md), not per-price object creation.
Per mission scope, the checkout/donation flow was NOT switched to any live identifiers and no donation tier, page, or flow was changed.
